title: Group Personal Accident
definition: Group Personal Accident Covers employees against accidental loss of life or disability arising out of an accident while on duty or pleasure on a 24-hour basis. Who is this for? It's suitable for anybody or group that experiences a risk of accident that can lead to death or incapacitation.
benefits: Group Personal Accident covers the following: â ̄Accidental Death Permanent Total Disablement (PTD) Temporary Total Disablement (TTD) Medical expenses Funeral expenses Occupational diseases
eligibility: Please contact Old Mutual Uganda for detailed eligibility and application requirements.
